blockers.expected_action: Promote ECOS from metadata-only to bounded sample-call verification after statCode, cycle, date-window, and item samples are pinned.
Register an ECOS adapter with verification and call capabilities before runtime evidence can be generated.
Define a non-secret API key injection path for source-scoped CI and local bounded checks.
Pin at least one statCode, cycle, startDate, endDate, and itemCode sample for a bounded first batch.
Materialize a source-scoped ECOS registry or verification candidate list before collecting evidence.

next_evidence_plan.first_batch_policy: Run a credential-gated bounded sample-call batch only after ECOS statCode/cycle/date-window/itemCode parameters are pinned.
next_evidence_plan.promotion_gate: Do not promote ECOS datasets beyond registry_only until runtime evidence and time-series mapping contracts exist.

warnings.expected: ECOS has source-scoped runtime evidence after adapter and sample parameters are pinned.
warnings.actual: 0 runtime checks are collected for ECOS.
warnings.remaining: Create the ECOS source registry/candidate list and run the first bounded verification batch.

warnings.expected: ECOS adapter has verification and call capabilities.
warnings.actual: adapter.status is none and adapter_capabilities is empty.
warnings.remaining: Register the ECOS adapter before evidence collection.
